name: Chicken and Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Season chicken with salt and pepper to taste.
2. Place the seasoned chicken in the crockpot.
3. Mix the wine and cream of mushroom soup in a bowl.
4. Pour the mixture over the chicken in the crockpot.
5. Sprinkle mushrooms evenly over the top of the chicken.
6. Cook on low for 7-9 hours or on high for 3-4 hours.
7. Sliced onions can be added for an alternative flavor.
Servings: 4
